# Image Pack — Ironwood Ridge Constructors (l-construction-v01)

Synthetic images for IKAM multimodal benchmarks.

## Folders
- `logos/` — logo explorations
- `people/` — synthetic staff headshots
- `site/` — construction progress photos (no readable addresses/plates)
- `diagrams/` — schedule/CO/WIP/RFI visuals
- `social/` — recruiting + project update templates

## Metadata
- `prompts.jsonl` (JSON per line)

Required keys: id, out_path, kind, prompt, negative_prompt, model, checkpoint, sampler, steps, guidance, width, height, seed, created_at
Optional: style_tags, notes, source_case_id

## Style
- Vibe: regional GC.
- Palette: charcoal + desert sand + teal accent.

## Safety
- No real brands.
- No readable street addresses, license plates, or company signage.
